sentences.target: 私は大好きなケーキを買った。
sentences.reading: わたくしはだいすきなけーきをかった。

translations.en: I bought the cake I love.
translations.es: Compré el pastel que me encanta.
translations.fr: J’ai acheté le gâteau que j’adore.
translations.de: Ich habe den Kuchen gekauft, den ich liebe.
translations.it: Ho comprato la torta che amo.
translations.pt: Comprei o bolo que eu amo.
translations.vi: Tôi đã mua chiếc bánh mà tôi yêu thích.
translations.nl: Ik heb de taart gekocht waar ik van hou.
translations.hu: Megvettem azt a tortát, amit szeretek.
translations.hi: मैंने वह केक खरीदा जो मुझे पसंद है।
translations.id: Saya membeli kue yang saya sukai.
translations.ro: Am cumpărat tortul pe care îl iubesc.

tokens.explanation: A first-person pronoun referring to the speaker, serving as the topic of the sentence.
Topic-marking particle indicating that 'I' is the topic.
A na-adjective meaning 'to love' or 'favorite,' modifying 'cake.'
Linking particle that connects the na-adjective '大好き' to the noun 'ケーキ.'
The direct object noun 'cake' which is being bought.
Object-marking particle indicating that 'cake' is the direct object.
Past-tense verb 'bought,' indicating the completed action of purchasing.

sentences.target: 猫は大好きな魚を見つけた。
sentences.reading: ねこはだいすきなさかなをみつけた。

translations.en: The cat found the fish it loves.
translations.es: El gato encontró al pez que ama.
translations.fr: Le chat a trouvé le poisson qu’il aime.
translations.de: Die Katze hat den Fisch gefunden, den sie liebt.
translations.it: Il gatto ha trovato il pesce che ama.
translations.zh-Hans: 猫找到了它最喜欢的鱼。
translations.pt: O gato encontrou o peixe que ama.
translations.he: החתול מצא את הדג שהוא אוהב.
translations.vi: Con mèo đã tìm thấy con cá mà nó yêu thích.
translations.nl: De kat vond de vis waar hij van houdt.
translations.hu: A macska megtalálta azt a halat, amit szeret.
translations.hi: बिल्ली को वह मछली मिल गई जिसे वह प्यार करती है।
translations.el: Η γάτα βρήκε το ψάρι που αγαπά.
translations.id: Kucing itu menemukan ikan yang disukainya.
translations.ro: Pisica a găsit peștele pe care îl iubește.
translations.fi: Kissa löysi kalan, jota se rakastaa.

tokens.explanation: The subject noun 'cat,' which is the topic of the sentence.
Topic-marking particle indicating 'cat' as the topic.
Na-adjective meaning 'favorite,' describing the noun 'fish.'
Linking particle connecting the na-adjective '大好き' to '魚.'
The direct object noun 'fish' which is found.
Object-marking particle indicating 'fish' as the direct object of 'found.'
Past-tense verb 'found,' indicating the cat discovered the fish.

sentences.target: 彼は大好きな本を読んでいる。
sentences.reading: かれはだいすきなほんをよんでいる。

translations.en: He is reading his favorite book.
translations.it: Sta leggendo il suo libro preferito.
translations.ko: 그는 가장 좋아하는 책을 읽고 있다.
translations.pt: Ele está lendo seu livro favorito.
translations.he: הוא קורא את הספר האהוב עליו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang đọc cuốn sách yêu thích của mình.
translations.hi: वह अपनी पसंदीदा किताब पढ़ रहा है।

tokens.explanation: Third-person pronoun 'he,' serving as the topic.
Topic marker indicating that 'he' is the topic.
Na-adjective 'favorite,' modifying the noun 'book.'
Linking particle connecting '大好き' to '本.'
The direct object noun 'book' being read.
Object-marking particle indicating 'book' as the affected object.
Te-form of 'to read,' linking to the auxiliary verb 'いる' for progressive aspect.
Auxiliary verb indicating the ongoing (progressive) action of reading.

sentences.target: 今日は大好きな友達と公園で遊んだ。
sentences.reading: きょうはだいすきなともだちとこうえんであそんだ。

translations.en: Today, I played at the park with my favorite friend.
translations.es: Hoy he jugado en el parque con mi amigo favorito.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, j’ai joué au parc avec mon ami préféré.
translations.de: Heute habe ich mit meinem Lieblingsfreund im Park gespielt.
translations.it: Oggi ho giocato al parco con il mio amico preferito.
translations.ko: 오늘은 내가 가장 좋아하는 친구와 공원에서 놀았다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天，我和我最喜欢的朋友在公园玩耍。
translations.yue: 今日，我同我最鍾意嘅朋友喺公園玩。
translations.ru: Сегодня я играл в парке с моим любимым другом.
translations.pt: Hoje, brinquei no parque com meu amigo favorito.
translations.he: היום שיחקתי בפארק עם החבר האהוב עליי.
translations.tr: Bugün, en sevdiğim arkadaşımla parkta oynadım.
translations.vi: Hôm nay, tôi chơi ở công viên với người bạn yêu thích của mình.
translations.ar: اليوم، لعبت في الحديقة مع صديقي المفضل.
translations.nl: Vandaag heb ik in het park gespeeld met mijn favoriete vriend.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я грав у парку зі своїм улюбленим другом.
translations.hu: Ma a parkban játszottam a kedvenc barátommal.
translations.hi: आज, मैं अपने पसंदीदा दोस्त के साथ पार्क में खेला।
translations.pl: Dziś bawiłem się w parku z moim ulubionym przyjacielem.
translations.el: Σήμερα, έπαιξα στο πάρκο με τον αγαπημένο μου φίλο.
translations.nb: I dag lekte jeg i parken med min favorittvenn.
translations.id: Hari ini, saya bermain di taman dengan teman favorit saya.
translations.sv: Idag lekte jag i parken med min favoritvän.
translations.ro: Astăzi, m-am jucat în parc cu prietenul meu preferat.
translations.cs: Dnes jsem si hrál v parku se svým oblíbeným kamarádem.
translations.da: I dag legede jeg i parken med min yndlingsven.

tokens.explanation: Time-noun 'today,' marking when the action took place.
Topic marker indicating 'today' as the topic.
Na-adjective 'favorite,' modifying 'friend.'
Linking particle connecting '大好き' to '友達.'
Noun 'friend,' indicating the person with whom the speaker played.
Comitative particle meaning 'with,' marking companionship.
Location noun 'park' where the action took place.
Locative particle marking 'park' as the place of action.
Past-tense verb 'played,' describing the completed activity.

jp: 私は大好きなケーキを買った。
猫は大好きな魚を見つけた。
彼は大好きな本を読んでいる。
今日は大好きな友達と公園で遊んだ。
fu: わたしはだいすきなけーきをかった。
ねこはだいすきなさかなをみつけた。
かれはだいすきなほんをよんでいる。
きょうはだいすきなともだちとこうえんであそんだ。
en: I bought the cake I love.
The cat found the fish it loves.
He is reading his favorite book.
Today, I played at the park with my favorite friend.
